meta.title: Ece Dalpolat — AI Engineer & Data Scientist
meta.description: Portfolio of Ece Dalpolat, AI Engineer & Data Scientist

hero.bio: I build production AI systems for HR and talent analytics — dbt data platforms, multi-tenant agents, and structured LLM microservices. Currently pursuing an MSc at Işık University while engineering AI at Qkare.

about.label: Background
about.title: About Me
about.p1: I'm an AI Engineer and data science enthusiast pursuing a Master's in Information Technologies at Işık University, with a Bachelor's in Software Engineering from Kırklareli University.
about.p2: At Qkare, I own core pieces of a multi-tenant HR analytics stack: the dbt transformation layer (109+ models, native PostgreSQL RLS, AI precompute marts), production LangChain / LangGraph agents over psychometric data, and advisor microservices for KPIs and competency selection. I also built the agent API gateway that standardizes auth, invoke contracts, and observability across downstream AI services.
about.p3: My work spans structured LLM output (JSON mode, Pydantic validation), embedding-free and vector RAG patterns, LLM-as-judge eval pipelines, and cost-aware inference cascades — from early clustering R&D through production B2B SaaS.

contact.label: Get in touch
contact.title: Contact
contact.intro: I'm open to new opportunities, collaborations, and interesting conversations about AI, data engineering, and ML. Feel free to reach out through any of the channels below.
